name: Treat Key Loggers as Offenses
notes: Enable this rule if you wish all events categorized as key loggers to create offenses.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Key Loggers
TD_list: APPLY Treat Key Loggers as Offenses on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Key Loggers
